hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "✅ syntax OK: $(basename $FILE)"; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == *strategies/* || "$FILE" == *demo_trader.py || "$FILE" == *app.py ]]; then cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && python3 scripts/check.py --quiet; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ -z "$FILE" ]] && exit 0; if [[ "$FILE" == *knowledge-base/wiki/* ]]; then cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Wiki updated: '"$(basename $FILE)"'. Run /wiki-lint to check for broken links and contradictions."}}'; fi

cd /Users/jg-n-012/test/fx-ai-trader && if [ -f knowledge-base/wiki/index.md ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"'"$(sed 's/"/\\"/g; s/$/\\n/' knowledge-base/wiki/index.md | tr -d '\n' | head -c 2000)"'"}}'; fi

hooks.prompt: Before compacting, preserve these critical items from the knowledge-base: 1) Current Tier classifications from knowledge-base/wiki/index.md 2) Independent audit binding recommendations from knowledge-base/wiki/decisions/ 3) Any edge hypotheses being actively evaluated from knowledge-base/wiki/edges/edge-pipeline.md. Summarize these into the compaction context so they survive.
